name: PwC
description: PricewaterhouseCoopers â HR transformation with D365 F&O and AD integrations

integrations.name: Darwinbox â D365 F&O Employee Sync
integrations.description: Full employee master sync from Darwinbox to Microsoft D365 Finance & Operations. Covers new hire, transfers, separations via OData batch API.
integrations.nextAction: Complete UAT for separation scenario. Schedule go-live call with PwC HRMS team.

timeline.update: OData batch endpoint configured. Employee create and update tested successfully in UAT. Separation scenario pending.
BRD signed off by PwC HRMS lead. Development started on employee payload mapping. 42 fields mapped.
Kickoff call completed. Access to D365 sandbox granted. API keys shared via secure channel.

integrations.name: Darwinbox Leave â D365 Leave Sync
integrations.description: Bi-directional leave balance and transaction sync between Darwinbox and D365. Blocker: D365 leave schema mismatch with Darwinbox leave types.
integrations.nextAction: Escalate schema mismatch to PwC D365 admin. Get mapping table approved before resuming dev.

timeline.update: Critical blocker: PwC D365 has 14 custom leave types not present in Darwinbox. Mapping is ambiguous. Escalated to client.
Initial leave API testing done. Balance read works. Write endpoint returning 400 on custom leave types.
Scope document drafted. Leave types inventory collected from D365. Mismatch identified and documented.

integrations.name: Active Directory Provisioning
integrations.description: Auto-provision AD accounts for new hires from Darwinbox triggers. Includes group assignment based on department and location.

timeline.update: Go-live complete. 37 new hires provisioned in first week. Zero failures reported. Handover document shared with PwC IT.
UAT passed. All 12 test cases green. PwC IT sign-off received.
LDAP write connector built. Group policy mapping finalized for 8 departments.

integrations.name: ServiceNow ITSM Integration
integrations.description: Auto-raise ServiceNow IT tickets on new hire events in Darwinbox. Laptop, access card, and system access requests.
integrations.nextAction: Collect ServiceNow instance details and API credentials from PwC IT. Set up dev environment.

timeline.update: Added to Q3 roadmap. PwC IT POC identified â Rajesh Nair. Credentials request sent.

integrations.name: Workday Compensation Sync
integrations.description: Sync compensation bands and salary data from Workday into Darwinbox for unified reporting. On hold pending Workday license renewal at PwC.
integrations.nextAction: Follow up on Workday license status in July. Resume planning once confirmed.

timeline.update: Project paused. PwC Workday contract under renegotiation. Expected to resume Q3.
Scoping call done. Workday SOAP API identified. High-level mapping completed.

name: Singlife
description: Singlife â insurance company, Singapore. Payroll and SSO integrations in progress.

integrations.name: Payroll SFTP â Darwinbox to ADP
integrations.description: Automated payroll file generation from Darwinbox with PGP encryption and SFTP push to Singlife ADP server. Runs on monthly payroll cycle.

timeline.update: April payroll run successful. 842 employees processed. PGP encryption verified on ADP side. Monitoring in place.
Parallel run with existing process completed. Data matches 100%. Client sign-off received.
SFTP pipeline and PGP encryption script deployed. Test file pushed and confirmed received by Singlife team.

integrations.name: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Sync
integrations.description: One-way employee master data sync from Darwinbox to SAP SF. Covers new hires, role changes, and exits.
integrations.nextAction: Complete field mapping for custom SF attributes. Begin dev on delta sync logic.

timeline.update: SAP OData API explored. 38 standard fields mapped. 7 custom SF attributes need schema clarification from Singlife.
BRD v1 shared with Singlife HRIS team. Review meeting scheduled for May 28.

integrations.name: Okta SSO Integration
integrations.description: SAML 2.0 SSO between Darwinbox and Okta. Single sign-on for Singlife employees accessing Darwinbox via Okta portal.

timeline.update: Production go-live done. All 1200 users can SSO into Darwinbox via Okta. Zero login tickets in first 48hrs.
SAML metadata exchanged. UAT with 15 pilot users â all passed. MFA flow tested.
SP and IdP metadata configured. Attribute mapping completed for email, department, manager fields.

integrations.name: HRIS Headcount Report Automation
integrations.description: Automated headcount report from Darwinbox API delivered to Singlife leadership every Monday morning. Current blocker: Darwinbox API rate limits causing timeout on large datasets.
integrations.nextAction: Implement pagination and retry logic. Test with full 1200-employee dataset before redeploying.

timeline.update: Testing this Integration tracker
Rate limit issue confirmed â Darwinbox API times out after 500 records. Pagination workaround being designed.
First automated run failed with 429 errors on full dataset. Works fine for <500 employees.
Report template finalized with Singlife CFO office. Fields: headcount by BU, location, grade, YoY delta.

integrations.name: Teams Org Chart Sync
integrations.description: Sync Darwinbox org hierarchy into Microsoft Teams org chart. Real-time manager-reportee mapping using Graph API.
integrations.nextAction: Get Microsoft Graph API access from Singlife IT. Review Teams org chart sync documentation.

timeline.update: Added to Q3 scope. Microsoft Graph API docs reviewed. Requires Azure AD app registration on Singlife tenant.

name: CMA CGM
description: CMA CGM â global shipping company. Oracle HCM, ADP Payroll, and Kronos WFM integrations.

integrations.name: Darwinbox â Oracle HCM Sync
integrations.description: Employee master data sync from Darwinbox to Oracle HCM Cloud. Covers 6000+ employees across 15 countries.
integrations.nextAction: Complete testing for multi-country employee records. Handle timezone and date format variations.

timeline.update: Phase 1 (India employees) sync tested successfully. Phase 2 (APAC) blocked on country-specific attribute mapping.
Oracle HCM REST API integrated. Authentication with JWT working. HSDL payload builder completed.
Scoping workshop with CMA CGM HRIT team in Paris (virtual). 120 fields identified for sync.

integrations.name: ADP Payroll Integration
integrations.description: Monthly payroll file delivery from Darwinbox to ADP Global Payroll for CMA CGM France entity. On hold â ADP contract renewal in progress.
integrations.nextAction: Track ADP contract status. Resume design once new contract confirmed.

timeline.update: Project paused. CMA CGM procurement team renegotiating ADP global contract. ETA: August 2025.
Initial scoping done. ADP API explored. File format specification received from ADP team.

integrations.name: Kronos Workforce Integration
integrations.description: Sync employee schedules and attendance from Kronos WFM into Darwinbox for leave reconciliation.
integrations.nextAction: Add to Q4 roadmap. Collect Kronos API documentation from CMA CGM IT.

timeline.update: Requirement confirmed in roadmap review. Kronos WFM version: 8.1. API docs requested from CMA CGM IT.

integrations.name: SAP Concur Expense Sync
integrations.description: Push approved expense reports from SAP Concur into Darwinbox for reimbursement processing against employee records.
integrations.nextAction: Resolve OAuth token refresh issue in Concur sandbox. Expected fix by June 20.

timeline.update: OAuth token refresh failing after 1hr. Raised with Concur support â ticket #SCC-8847. Workaround: manual token re-auth every hour (not acceptable).
Concur API integrated. Expense report fetch working. Mapping to Darwinbox payroll fields 70% complete.
Kickoff done. Concur sandbox access received. 18 expense categories to be mapped.

integrations.name: LDAP Directory Sync
integrations.description: One-way LDAP sync from Darwinbox to CMA CGM Active Directory for employee attribute updates â email, designation, department, manager.

timeline.update: Live for 3 weeks. 220+ attribute updates processed without issues. Scheduled at 2AM IST daily. Monitoring dashboard shared with CMA CGM IT.
UAT completed. 100% attribute match verified across 3200 employee records.
LDAP connector configured. Attribute mapping done for 12 fields. Test sync with 50 records successful.

name: AU Bank
description: AU Small Finance Bank â Finacle HRMS, D365 leave, and approver mapping integrations.

integrations.name: Finacle â Darwinbox Employee Sync
integrations.description: One-way employee master sync from Finacle HRMS into Darwinbox. Covers 9000+ bank employees across all branches.

timeline.update: Go-live successful. All 9,247 employee records synced on Day 1. Delta sync running nightly. Finacle team confirmed data accuracy.
UAT complete. 250 test records validated by AU Bank HR ops team. Sign-off received.
Finacle REST API integrated. 56 fields mapped. Custom logic for branch-code-to-location mapping built.
Kickoff with AU Bank HRMS team. API documentation received. Dev environment set up.

integrations.name: Darwinbox Leave â D365 F&O Sync
integrations.description: Leave balance and transaction sync from Darwinbox to AU Bank D365 for payroll processing. OData batch API approach.
integrations.nextAction: Finalize error handling for mid-month leave cancellations. Schedule UAT with AU Bank payroll team.

timeline.update: OData batch write working for leave balances. Testing leave cancellation reversal scenario â edge case identified.
D365 OData read confirmed. 8 leave types mapped. Batch write endpoint tested with 20 records.
Access to AU Bank D365 UAT tenant received. API credentials set up. Payload design started.

integrations.name: Appraisal Tool Integration
integrations.description: Sync appraisal ratings from AU Bank internal tool into Darwinbox for performance module. Blocked by internal tool API being deprecated â migration underway.
integrations.nextAction: Wait for AU Bank IT to confirm new appraisal tool API. Escalated to project manager.

timeline.update: At risk. AU Bank confirmed their internal appraisal tool API is being deprecated. New tool (Oracle Taleo) expected Q3. Timeline impact.
Initial API exploration done. Appraisal data model documented. API deprecation notice received from AU Bank IT â escalated.

integrations.name: HRMS Approver Mapping
integrations.description: Automated approver hierarchy mapping from AU Bank HRMS into Darwinbox workflow engine. Covers leave, expense, and attendance approvals.

timeline.update: Approver mapping live for all 9000+ employees. Leave approval workflows active. Zero escalations in first week.
UAT done across 4 BUs. All approval chains verified. BRD closed.
Approver hierarchy extracted from HRMS. 12 approval levels mapped. Edge cases for matrix org handled.

integrations.name: ServiceNow IT Ticket Automation
integrations.description: Auto-create ServiceNow tickets for onboarding/offboarding events from Darwinbox. Provides laptop, ID card, and access provisioning requests to IT.
integrations.nextAction: Resume when AU Bank IT completes ServiceNow upgrade to Tokyo release. ETA: August 2025.

timeline.update: On hold. AU Bank IT upgrading ServiceNow from Rome to Tokyo. API changes expected. Will reassess in August.
Scoping done. ServiceNow incident/request API documented. 3 ticket templates designed.

name: MakeMyTrip
description: MakeMyTrip â India's leading travel platform. BambooHR, Salesforce, and Slack integrations.

integrations.name: BambooHR â Darwinbox Sync
integrations.description: Migrate and sync employee data from BambooHR into Darwinbox as MMT consolidates HR systems. One-time migration + ongoing delta sync.
integrations.nextAction: Complete data cleansing on BambooHR export. 340 records have missing manager IDs â flagged to MMT HR.

timeline.update: Data audit complete. 3,200 of 3,540 records clean. 340 with missing manager IDs sent to MMT HR for correction.
BambooHR API access granted. Full data export pulled. Field mapping 80% complete. Date format inconsistencies found.
Kickoff call with MMT HRIS and IT teams. Scope confirmed: 3,540 employees, 62 fields, delta sync every 6 hours.

integrations.name: Slack Employee Directory Sync
integrations.description: Real-time sync of employee profiles from Darwinbox into Slack directory. Keeps display names, titles, departments, and manager info current.

timeline.update: Production live. 3,540 Slack profiles updated. Automated on hire/transfer/exit events. MMT People Ops confirmed accuracy.
Slack SCIM API integrated. Webhook from Darwinbox triggers Slack update within 2 minutes of any change. UAT passed.
Slack Enterprise Grid access set up. OAuth scoped. 5 profile fields mapped and tested.

integrations.name: Workday Position Sync
integrations.description: Sync open and filled positions from Workday into Darwinbox for headcount tracking and requisition management.
integrations.nextAction: Collect Workday tenant access credentials. Review Workday SOAP API for position data.

timeline.update: Scoped in Q3 roadmap. Workday access request raised with MMT IT. ETA for credentials: 2 weeks.

integrations.name: Salesforce Employee Data Push
integrations.description: Push employee contact and role data from Darwinbox to Salesforce for account team mapping. At risk due to Salesforce field-level encryption changes.
integrations.nextAction: Coordinate with MMT Salesforce admin to resolve field encryption policy. May need Salesforce Shield exemption.

timeline.update: Salesforce Shield encryption enabled on target fields â API writes now failing with FIELD_INTEGRITY_EXCEPTION. Escalated to MMT SF admin.
Salesforce Connected App set up. OAuth working. Write to standard Contact object successful. Custom field writes failing â encryption issue found.
Field mapping finalized. 18 Darwinbox fields to 22 Salesforce Contact/Employee fields (some split). Dev underway.

integrations.name: Jira Auto-Ticket for IT Requests
integrations.description: Auto-create Jira IT tickets when Darwinbox onboarding tasks trigger hardware/software requests at MMT.
integrations.nextAction: Resume Q4. MMT IT rebuilding Jira project structure â new board expected by September.

timeline.update: On hold. MMT IT reorganizing Jira projects and workflows. Current Jira structure being scrapped. Integration to be redesigned post-reorg.
Initial scoping done. Jira REST API v3 documented. Jira project key and ticket types mapped with MMT IT.

integrations.name: DarwinBox Microsoft FnO HRMS and Leave
integrations.description: One Way integration between DB and FnO, Custom Integration as FnO APIs are to be consumed for both Employee Data and Leaves
